zh.King's Stanley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾金也斯 斯坦利
zh.Stonehouse, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾斯同豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire於大約1124年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親William 3rd baron d'abrancis26歲，母親Cecily de Raleigh25歲。她於大約1146年與Thurstan le Despenser在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1182年在英國盧特藍德格拉爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國盧特藍德格拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire于大约1124年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲William 3rd baron d'abrancis26岁，母亲Cecily de Raleigh25岁。她于大约1146年与Thurstan le Despenser在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1182年在英国盧特藍德格拉爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国盧特藍德格拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire was born about 1124, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, William 3rd baron d'abrancis, was 26 and her mother, Cecily de Raleigh, was 25. She married Thurstan le Despenser about 1146, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died about 1182, in Ryhall, Rutland, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Ryhall, Rutland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire est née environ 1124, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William 3rd baron d'abrancis, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Raleigh, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thurstan le Despenser environ 1146, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1182, à Ryhall, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Ryhall, Rutland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire um 1124 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William 3rd baron d'abrancis 26 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Raleigh 25. Sie hat um 1146 in London, Middlesex, England Thurstan le Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb um 1182 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ryhall, Rutland, England und wurde in Ryhall, Rutland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire è nata il circa 1124 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, William 3rd baron d'abrancis, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Raleigh, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thurstan le Despenser circa 1146, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì circa 1182, nel Ryhall, Rutland, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Ryhall, Rutland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Lucia de Oxfordshireが約1124年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父William 3rd baron d'abrancisは26歳，母Cecily de Raleighは25歳であった。約1146年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでThurstan le Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1182年にイギリスルトランドリハルで60歳で死去し，イギリスルトランドリハルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire(이)가 대략 1124년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William 3rd baron d'abrancis(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Raleigh(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1146년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Thurstan le Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1182년 영국 루틀랜드 리홀에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 루틀랜드 리홀에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1124–about 1182: tany ho any amin'ny 1124–tany ho any amin'ny 1182

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire nasceu aproximadamente 1124, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William 3rd baron d'abrancis, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Raleigh, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thurstan le Despenser aproximadamente 1146, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1182, em Ryhall, Rutland, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Ryhall, Rutland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire родилась около 1124 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William 3rd baron d'abrancis было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Raleigh, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thurstan le Despenser около 1146 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла около 1182 г. в местности рихолл, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности рихолл, рутланд, Англия.

sm.about 1124–about 1182: e tusa o le 1124–e tusa o le 1182

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Lucia de Oxfordshire nació aproximadamente 1124, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William 3rd baron d'abrancis, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Cecily de Raleigh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thurstan le Despenser aproximadamente 1146, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1182, en Ryhall, Rutland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Ryhall, Rutland, Inglaterra.
